block_00: Today we are happy to announce the arrival of a new landing page. What makes it a cause for celebration, you ask? Our in-house media-buying team tried and tested this new landing page (as they always do), and we were pleased to see that it produced the best results out of all landing pages launched in the past year. In fact, it shows outstanding performance in terms of both desktop and mobile traffic.
block_01: The best part? There are different variations of this landing page: two for mobile traffic and one for web. For mobile, you can opt for the page that promotes our app or better yet, our PWA. That’s three different ways to profit — the choice is yours.
block_02: Check out our latest landing page and make sure to select the version that best suits your preferred traffic. Multiple languages are available.
block_06: Simply put, a PWA is an application that behaves like a native mobile app but runs in a web browser.
block_08: Getting access to the PWA takes less effort than installing an iOS or Android app
block_10: where our apps are not available
block_12: It allows non-regulated users to trade binary options (which aren’t available in official mobile apps)
block_13: Given the numerous benefits of PWAs, we highly encourage directing your traffic there, especially if you are working with iOS traffic.
